pi_items.source: Parsing the actual dataset (SampleDivesV2.ssrf) reveals no dives occurred on 2011-09-20. The closest dives at 'Yellow House' occurred on 2011-09-29 and 2011-09-30.
Task instructions explicitly request setting the Suit field to '5mm wetsuit'.
Task instructions explicitly request setting the Divemaster field to 'Brian Harper'.
Verified from setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which explicitly manage this file path.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires modifying a dive log in the real dataset SampleDivesV2.ssrf. The prompt asks the agent to target a dive on 'September 20, 2011' at 'Yellow House'. However, parsing the dataset verifies that no dives occurred on September 20; the closest dives at 'Yellow House' actually occurred on September 29, 2011. The expected new values for Suit ('5mm wetsuit') and Divemaster ('Brian Harper') are explicitly required by the instructions.
